headline: JPMorgan Balances On Chain Treasury Fund With Warning On UK Taxes
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) has launched the JPMorgan OnChain Liquidity Token Money Market Fund, a blockchain based product linked to the Ethereum network and investing in U.S. Treasuries. The bank also issued a public warning that it may reconsider investment in a major London headquarters project if a new UK government raises bank taxes. JPMorgan Chase is one of the largest global banks, with businesses across consumer banking, wholesale banking, markets and asset management. Its new on...
